Chlorocyperus flabellatus is a plant with medicinal properties. Its health benefits are largely unconfirmed, but it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Chlorocyperus flabellatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although these are not widely available or used in traditional medicine.
